title: ボーノなレースに必要なもの！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle has become stronger, faster, and
even beefier in her quest to defeat Hishi
Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her rival in such good form inspires Hishi
Akebono to whip up high protein meals to help
her get stronger, faster, and bulkier herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, Hishi Akebono and I work as one to build
her form to an even greater plateau.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She makes her own war declaration in response to
Taiki Shuttle's challenge at a press conference
leading up to the Mile Ch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The world takes notice as the two archrivals gear
up for an epic showdown, boosting expectations
for the Mile Ch. off the charts!
